cases.prompt: This result is surprisingly clean and will drive tomorrow's design decision. We have not reopened the literature or assembled a closure packet; try to falsify it.
cases.rationale: The orchestrator must refresh evidence before its stress-test child can run.

cases.prompt: Here are the frozen claim, refreshed CLOSED packet, immutable preregistration, raw results, and artifact hashes. Run the eight falsification trip-wires only; do not reacquire literature or repair code.
cases.rationale: All child preconditions are explicitly present and the requested scope is only wire execution.

cases.prompt: Design a new experiment around this mechanism, but the load-bearing literature and metrics have not been checked yet.
cases.rationale: Preregistration cannot begin until the orchestrator closes the premise rows.

cases.prompt: The frozen claim and CLOSED literature packet are attached. Freeze predictions, controls, value provenance, and decision rules before code; do not search again.
cases.rationale: The user supplies the child preconditions and explicitly narrows the task to preregistration.
